title: Proposed Data Center Site (Following Agricultural Rezoning circa 2024) (Lee Ogle Enterprise Zone)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

All records of communication from January of 2024 through the present (electronic or otherwise, including attachments and audio files) between the following agents and entities of the Lee-Ogle Enterprise Zone and Fehr Graham regarding all plans for development of a possible data center with any and all agents and assigns of Constellation Energy within the confines of Ogle County, namely the "02-24 MAP AMENDMENT rezoning from AG-1 to I-1 Industrial and properties described as follows and owned by Constellation Energy Generation, LLC: Part of the SW1/4 of the NW1/4 of Section 24 Rockvale Township 24N, R10E of the 4th P.M., approximately 1.3 acres, more or less and; Part of G.L. 2 of the SW1/4 of the SW1/4 Fractional Section 7; part of the NW1/4 of the NW1/4 of Section 17; part of G.L.1 & 2 of the NW1/4, part of the N1/2 of the NE1/4, part of G.L.1 & 2 of the SW1/4, part of G.L.1 & 2 of the NW1/4 in Fractional Section 18; and part of the NE1/4 of the NE1/4 of Section 19 all in Marion Township 24N, R11E of the 4th P.M., approximately 522.7 acres, more or less (524 acres total). Property Identification Number(s): 09-24-100-003, 10-07-300-001, 10-17-100-007, 10-18-100-001, 10-18-100-003, 10-18-100-004, 10-18-200-005, 10-18-300-001, 10-18-300-002, 10-19-100-003. Common Location: 5005 N. German Church Rd. and 3000 block of N. Black Walnut Rd., and other addresses.” (As identified in the Ogle County Board Minutes)

Lee-Ogle Enterprise Zone:
Andy Shaw (all agents and assigns)

Fehr Graham/Trilon: 
Any and all agents assigns

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

TK Reed

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

All records of communication from January of 2024 through the present (electronic or otherwise, including attachments and audio files) between the following agents and entities of the Lee-Ogle Enterprise Zone and the Ogle County Economic Development Corporation regarding all plans for development of a possible data center with any and all agents and assigns of Constellation Energy within the confines of Ogle County, namely the "02-24 MAP AMENDMENT rezoning from AG-1 to I-1 Industrial and properties described as follows and owned by Constellation Energy Generation, LLC: Part of the SW1/4 of the NW1/4 of Section 24 Rockvale Township 24N, R10E of the 4th P.M., approximately 1.3 acres, more or less and; Part of G.L. 2 of the SW1/4 of the SW1/4 Fractional Section 7; part of the NW1/4 of the NW1/4 of Section 17; part of G.L.1 & 2 of the NW1/4, part of the N1/2 of the NE1/4, part of G.L.1 & 2 of the SW1/4, part of G.L.1 & 2 of the NW1/4 in Fractional Section 18; and part of the NE1/4 of the NE1/4 of Section 19 all in Marion Township 24N, R11E of the 4th P.M., approximately 522.7 acres, more or less (524 acres total). Property Identification Number(s): 09-24-100-003, 10-07-300-001, 10-17-100-007, 10-18-100-001, 10-18-100-003, 10-18-100-004, 10-18-200-005, 10-18-300-001, 10-18-300-002, 10-19-100-003. Common Location: 5005 N. German Church Rd. and 3000 block of N. Black Walnut Rd., and other addresses.” (As identified in the Ogle County Board Minutes)

Lee-Ogle Enterprise Zone:
Andy Shaw

Ogle County Economic Development Corporation:
Randy Schoon
Darin DeHaan
Paula Diehl
John Rickard
Gary Binicewicz
Don Griffin
Karen Halstead
Tom Byro
Kevin Gadzala
Patricia Nordman
Darrell Polfliet
Jason Stoll
Liz Hiemstra

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

TK Reed
